text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #1)

Whoops. =^.^=

Just realized I submitted this for the wrong port by accident. Updated that bit so it now correctly says www/p5-Gtk2-WebKit .

As to BROKEN_FreeBSD_9, it works on 9, just not 9.3 and there is no BROKEN_FreeBSD_9_3.
